svg.text: Real-time Multimodal Live Agent · Flutter → Cloud Run (europe-west1) → Gemini 2.5 Flash Live
iOS & Android · Dart 3 · Riverpod State · GoRouter
Orchestrates: permissions → token fetch → WS connect → mic → playback → camera → tool bridge
Feature-agnostic via LiveSessionConfig presets (onboarding / quiz / vision_quest)
Emits LiveSessionState stream → Riverpod watches → UI rebuilds reactively
Exponential backoff · barge-in VAD detection · mic/camera guard · structured session audit log
JWT Bearer header on every request
Cloud Run (europe-west1) · TypeScript · Fastify 5 · Firebase Admin SDK
HTTP → WebSocket upgrade · Event codec & binary chunk multiplexer
Routes: PCM audio, JPEG frames, tool_response JSON, session lifecycle events
Reads user profile from Firestore → buildPersonalizedInstruction()
Returns: token · sessionId · model · expiresAt · systemInstruction · tool declarations
Active session registry (in-memory Map with TTL)
toolSchemas.ts: 15 Zod-validated schemas enforce arg bounds
QUIZ: start_live_round · grade_answer · award_territory · apply_combo_bonus · grant_materials · end_round
Correlation ID per tool call — blocks double-grant in same session
Auth middleware: Firebase ID token verification on every protected route
getAuth().verifyIdToken(bearerToken) → uid injected into request context
Firebase · Gemini AI API · Secret Manager · Cloud Build · Artifact Registry
Native Speech-to-Speech · Voice Activity Detection (VAD) · Barge-in support
Receives 15 function declarations → emits tool_call → backend executes → receives tool_response
Responds with audio PCM chunks → Flutter AudioPlaybackService streams to speaker
Collections: users · districts · sectors · squads · events · leaderboards · missions · rewards
Stores: hex map sector ownership · XP · streaks · structures · blueprints · materials
Written by: Admin SDK in tool handlers (award_territory, unlock_structure, grant_materials)
Read by: Flutter client SDK → reactive district / leaderboard updates
Issues JWT ID tokens → verified by getAuth().verifyIdToken() on every API request
No env file committed to git
Security Rules · Deployed via Firebase CLI
firestore.rules: users can only read/write own uid paths · storage.rules: content-type + uid guard
